emails.subject: Re: Duke
emails.body: Re: Duke Edmund, I heard yesterday you have been out for quite a while sick. I had no idea. What's the scoop? Should I be worried?

emails.subject: Re: Duke

emails.subject: Re: Duke
emails.body: I had a hernia two years ago. It's not fun. Mine didn't sound as bad as your does, though. You haven't been having a good year. I hope things improve. Edmund Cooper 08/17/2000 04:22 PM

emails.subject: Re: Duke
emails.body: I had a hernia two years ago. It's not fun. Mine didn't sound as bad as your does, though. You haven't been having a good year. I hope things improve. Edmund Cooper 08/17/2000 04:22 PM

emails.subject: Re: Duke
emails.body: Thanks! Sorry i'm a little behind with things as I'm working on my slow laptop from home on extended sick leave at the moment! Edmund From: Tana Jones on 17/08/2000 16:16 CDT

emails.subject: Re: Duke
emails.body: Thanks! Sorry i'm a little behind with things as I'm working on my slow laptop from home on extended sick leave at the moment! Edmund From: Tana Jones on 17/08/2000 16:16 CDT

emails.subject: Re: Duke
emails.body: Not terminal at least I hope not! I have a hiatus hernia which has been giving me a lot of difficulties recently. I've been to hospital for a variety of test; some not so yucky, so a it yucky (tubes down the nose and into the stomach!). I'm seeing my specialist tomorrow to get all the results and determine a suitable course of action I'm getting a bit fed up swallowing pills that aren't really doing that much anyway. I'll keep you updated but don't worry I'll be back on full form in the hopefully not too distant future. Edmund From: Tana Jones on 17/08/2000 16:17 CDT
